tools.name: wscdc_health
tools.description: Ping the AFIP WSCDC service (Dummy operation). Returns AppServer/DbServer/AuthServer statuses. Use to confirm WSCDC is reachable + your WSAA token still works before a batch validation flow.

tools.name: wscdc_validate_comprobante
tools.description: Verify a received invoice's CAE against AFIP (constatar comprobante, verificar CAE de una factura recibida): confirms it was actually issued by AFIP. Use this BEFORE ingesting any received factura int
